'''Market Street''' was a location in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in the era of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. It was the site of the [[Market Street Outdoor Exchange]], a well-known outdoor market. In [[3963 BBY]], Taris was [[Taris Siege|invaded]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans, and Market Street was heavily looted before eventually being taken by the Mandalorians.

==Description==
Market Street was an area in the [[Upper City]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], extant as of [[3964 BBY]]. It was the location of the [[Market Street Outdoor Exchange]], an outdoor market where industrialists and [[Merchant/Legends|vendors]] could solicit investors for products such as [[Fleek eel/Legends|fleek eels]].<ref name="prime" />

==History==
The site of the Market Street Outdoor Exchange, Market Street in 3,964 BBY was the location of a sales pitch by a [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] industrialist known as [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Marn Hierogryph|Hieromarn]]. Hieromarn attempted to solicit investors in a venture to bring fleek [[Eel/Legends|eels]] from<ref name="prime" /> the planet [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen's]] [[Hocekureem Sea/Legends|Hocekureem Sea]]<ref name="sote">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref> to Taris for the local restaurant trade, promising a three-for-one return once a [[Tanker/Legends|tanker]] was hired and crewed.<ref name="prime" /> The [[3963 BBY|next]] [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Taris was [[Taris Siege|besieged]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans as part of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the battle, Market Street was heavily looted. Almost immediately after the looters left the area, the Mandalorians came in and seized Market Street.<ref name="invasion">{{KOTORbackups|18}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Market Street was first mentioned in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', an [[in-universe]] news report that can be found on the last page of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]], written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2006]].<ref name="prime" /> Market Street was also mentioned in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Invasion Edition]]'', a similar news report in [[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]].<ref name="invasion" />
